untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of initial move amplitude, retracement objectives using Fibonacci ratios (38.2%, 61.8%, 1.618x multiplier), Elliott wave pattern identification, and synchronized price-time goal detection. These require multi-bar lookback logic and custom retracement calculations not available in the allowed indicator set. The 38.2% retracement level cannot be expressed as a simple threshold on standard indicators without explicit move measurement and projection logic.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_14 is a sophisticated reversion signal based on Fibonacci retracement theory. The core logic requires: (1) detecting sustained moves, (2) identifying reversals, (3) calculating 38.2% retracement targets dynamically from the initial move, (4) comparing price and time goals at specific bars. The allowed indicator set lacks the structural capability to measure initial move amplitude, project retracement targets, or synchronize multi-dimensional objectives. A proper implementation would need custom functions for swing high/low detection and Fibonacci projection calculations.
